message:
feat(layout,render,core): incremental overlap alignment, east-asian width, and clippy fixes

- layout: replace edit-based dirty propagation with dirty-node-index set approach;
  add incremental_overlap_alignment to anchor clean regions during subgraph relayout;
  improve incremental trace with query_type and recomputed_nodes fields
- render-svg/canvas/term: use f32::midpoint for edge label midpoints; use i32::from
  for bool-to-int conversions in SVG arc paths; add callback node data attribute test
- render-term diff: account for east-asian wide characters in display_width and
  truncate_display using fm_core::is_east_asian_wide
- render-svg theme: use f32::midpoint in hex_to_hsl luminance calculation
- core: minor quotient_filter and font_metrics updates

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -215,8 +215,8 @@ impl PathCommand {
                     FmtNum(*rx),
                     FmtNum(*ry),
                     FmtNum(*x_rotation),
-                    if *large_arc { 1 } else { 0 },
-                    if *sweep { 1 } else { 0 },
+                    i32::from(*large_arc),
+                    i32::from(*sweep),
                     FmtNum(*x),
                     FmtNum(*y)
                 );
@@ -236,8 +236,8 @@ impl PathCommand {
                     FmtNum(*rx),
                     FmtNum(*ry),
                     FmtNum(*x_rotation),
-                    if *large_arc { 1 } else { 0 },
-                    if *sweep { 1 } else { 0 },
+                    i32::from(*large_arc),
+                    i32::from(*sweep),
                     FmtNum(*dx),
                     FmtNum(*dy)
                 );
